name: Mobile Responsive Behavior
purpose: Define how Work Mode screens adapt to small screens.
globalMobileRules: Approval bar can become sticky at bottom.
Avoid side-by-side editor and answer panes.
All section controls must fit without horizontal scrolling.
Touch targets should be at least 44px tall where practical.

screenAdaptations.mobileBehavior: Stack selectors vertically. Confidence and reason appear below selectors.
Skill cards stack. Module checklist uses full-width rows.
Each section becomes an expandable editor. Move controls become up/down icon buttons.
Sticky bottom bar with primary action. Secondary action appears in overflow menu.
Answer appears first, validation collapses below with summary badge.

accessibility: Focus moves into opened mobile action sheet.
Escape or close returns focus to triggering button.
Save and generation status use aria-live polite.

edgeCases.behavior: Composer and focused textarea should remain visible.
Wrap to multiple lines without overlapping controls.
Use collapsed section summaries to avoid endless dense editing surface.
